violations.text: The mobile cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
Hot hold door gasket on the hot hold unit by the prep area in the kitchen was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

Canned beans and commercially prepared chicken were only heated to 130 degrees Fahrenheit before being placed into hot holding. Ready to eat foods taken from a commercially processed can or intact package from a food processing plant must be heated to at least 135 degrees Fahrenheit for hot holding. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the hot hold unit, and milk case. Milk case 1 was observed in poor repair equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The condensate from the milk case refrigeration units is was observed frozen in excess on the inside of the machine. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Establishment must defrost equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025
The outside dumpsters are not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

Sweet and sour chicken was observed held at hot hold unit at 120 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food item was sent to reheated at the time of the inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023

Burritos and chicken parmigiana were observed held between 110- and 126-degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were reheated during time of the inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the 4-door reach-in have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
